Class TermLabelSV

java.lang.Object
org.key_project.logic.op.AbstractOperator
org.key_project.logic.op.AbstractSortedOperator
de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op.JAbstractSortedOperator
de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op.JOperatorSV
de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op.TermLabelSV
All Implemented Interfaces:
TermLabel, Sorted, Named, Operator, ParsableVariable, SortedOperator, OperatorSV, SchemaVariable, Sorted, SyntaxElement, TerminalSyntaxElement
public final class TermLabelSV extends JOperatorSV implements TermLabel
A schema variable which matches term labels

    • getTLChildCount

      public int getTLChildCount()
      Description copied from interface: TermLabel
      Gets the number of parameters of this term label.
      Specified by:
      getTLChildCount in interface TermLabel
      Returns:
      the number of parameters (a non-negative number)

    • getTLChild

      public Object getTLChild(int i)
      Description copied from interface: TermLabel
      Retrieves the i-th parameter object of this term label.

      A term label may have structure, i.e. can be parameterized.

      Specified by:
      getTLChild in interface TermLabel
      Parameters:
      i - the number of the parameter to retrieve ( 0 <= i < getChildCount())
      Returns:
      the selected parameter
